meaning: n.毕雷矿泉水(法国南部产的一种冒泡的矿泉水,商标名)
examples: Perrier was no longer just a bottle of water.
Please put one slice of lemon in my Perrier. Thank you!
Would you like sparkling mineral water , Evian or Perrier ?
"It was messy and a bit odd, " says Raymond Perrier, head of brand valuation at Interbrand.
In 1990 the business was booming until a benzene scare forced Perrier to do a large-scale recall.
